attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CIA (Common Infections & Afflictions) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled (option A) that the paediatric weight-based dosing sealed in CIA-032 (croup) is acceptable as clinician-administered answer-key content.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CIA casebundles in this batch (n=50)

codes_manifest.display: Bitten or stung by nonvenomous insect and other nonvenomous arthropods

transform_flags: Patient age not stated in source note — inferred as adult (46) from adult gardening context and 78 kg body weight; confirm on clinician review.
Patient sex not stated in source note — sex_at_birth inferred with no source signal to satisfy the required demographics field; confirm/correct on clinician review.
geographic_context omitted — not inferable from the source (private residence, gardening) without fabrication.
Provisional case_id SPEC-DERM-01-00202 (SEQ set into the provisional 002xx batch range (source CIA-022)) — ingest --reseq will assign the real per-bucket sequence.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person urgent home visit with clinician-measured vitals, palpation and auscultation; these were reprojected — patient/video-observable data placed in 01.objective_data_offered, and clinician-only exam/vitals sealed into 11 (SYM-006/007/008) with 10.telehealth_limits_for_this_case. Presentation layer de-anchored from the clinician's known benign conclusion and from the patient's catastrophic framing.

Candidate codes only (SNOMED_CT 262561005, ICD_10_AM W57, plus differential codes) — none verified against a terminology server; AMT/PBS medication codes were not assigned pending terminology receipt rather than guessing.

Triage calibrated LOW in the benign direction: correct_baseline_tier T1, minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T1; over_triage_threshold T3 flags that escalating the current benign presentation to urgent/ED is a defect. No critical baseline under-triage band exists for this self-limiting presentation (under_triage_critical_threshold set to the enum floor T0), so triage_error_taxonomy was omitted to avoid mislabelling an acceptable community/self-care disposition as a failure.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
